steps.title: Set up
steps.content: At $t = 0$ there are 238 people. The count decreases by 14 each minute, so the slope is $-14$. A linear model has the form: $$p(t) = -14t + 238$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Verify: at $t = 1$, $p(1) = -14(1) + 238 = 224$, which is $238 - 14$ — exactly 14 people boarded in the first minute.
